title: Ethereum support is live on Cryptool
content_html:
Ethereum support is now live. The same automated fundraising stack that launched on BNB Chain a month ago is open to Ethereum projects and investors today, with native support for ETH, USDT and USDC.

What works end to end from this morning:

  • Automated fundraising from pool open to final distribution
  • Syndicate management with no spreadsheets
  • Launchpads stood up in seconds
  • One-click raise pool deployment

OTC market, portfolio and asset management, and co-investing follow on Ethereum next.

With ETH and BNB both live, Cryptool now covers the two largest EVM ecosystems for Web3 fundraising. For investors, that is one platform sitting on top of two of the deepest liquidity pools in crypto.
author: Cryptool
